page_metadata.biotools__summary: This is developed for designing a single-strand RNA sequence with desired immunomodulatory potentials in order to develop RNA-based therapeutics, immunotherapy and vaccine-adjuvants. This server also facilitates the users in computer-aided designing of siRNAs with desired toxicity.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This is developed for designing a single-strand RNA sequence with desired immunomodulatory potentials in order to develop RNA-based therapeutics, immunotherapy and vaccine-adjuvants. This server also facilitates the users in computer-aided designing of siRNAs with desired toxicity.
